outline.caption: Timing is everything in VA school certification. Automate your process with VASCO Assistant Pro to ensure compliance and avoid overpayments. Learn more: Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4, as it could benefit from a more concise headline to better convey the message of empowering student veterans with streamlined certification.
